area: Team plan / stale broker registry residue
finding: `team plan --task TASK-TEAM-0040` fail-closed with `blocked-broker-cid-conflict` ("Proposal-first lane is active; broker recorded a provisional write lease") caused by leftover `.atm/runtime/broker-parallel-0041-0042/` registry state from a finished lane; the finding named no registry entry, age, owner, or cleanup command.
expectedBehavior: Broker conflict findings should identify the blocking registry entry (path, owner, age), classify obviously-terminal residue as stale, and emit the governed cleanup command instead of a generic rerun hint.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed 2026-07-14: `cleanupStaleWithEvidence()` + structured owner/age/cleanup guidance; `loadRegistry(..., { persistCleanup })` opt-out preserved. Tests: `registry-stale-cleanup.test.ts`.
followUp: Wire findings into team-lane surfaces; keep persistCleanup default true.
